'''zhasuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:khalva|khalva]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-s-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:khalva|khalva]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhasuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæsiyith|zhæsiyith]] || [[word:zhæsiyij|zhæsiyij]] || [[word:zhæsiyish|zhæsiyish]] || [[word:zhæsiyi|zhæsiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhasusuyuth|zhasusuyuth]] || [[word:zhasusuyuj|zhasusuyuj]] || [[word:zhasusuyush|zhasusuyush]] || [[word:zhasusuyu|zhasusuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhasuyuth|zhasuyuth]] || [[word:zhasuyuj|zhasuyuj]] || [[word:zhasuyush|zhasuyush]] || [[word:zhasuyu|zhasuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhasufyuth|zhasufyuth]] || [[word:zhasufyuj|zhasufyuj]] || [[word:zhasufyush|zhasufyush]] || [[word:zhasufyuf|zhasufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhasuyuthu|zhasuyuthu]] || [[word:zhasuyuju|zhasuyuju]] || [[word:zhasuyushu|zhasuyushu]] || [[word:zhasuyuku|zhasuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhasuyuth|zhasuyuth]] || [[word:zhasuyuj|zhasuyuj]] || [[word:zhasuyush|zhasuyush]] || [[word:zhasuyu|zhasuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhasuyuthul|zhasuyuthul]] || [[word:zhasuyujul|zhasuyujul]] || [[word:zhasuyushul|zhasuyushul]] || [[word:zhasuyukul|zhasuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhasuyuthuthu|zhasuyuthuthu]] || [[word:zhasuyujuju|zhasuyujuju]] || [[word:zhasuyushushu|zhasuyushushu]] || [[word:zhasuyuku|zhasuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhasuyuthun|zhasuyuthun]] || [[word:zhasuyujun|zhasuyujun]] || [[word:zhasuyushun|zhasuyushun]] || [[word:zhasuyukun|zhasuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhasuyuthuoro|zhasuyuthuoro]] || [[word:zhasuyujuoro|zhasuyujuoro]] || [[word:zhasuyushuoro|zhasuyushuoro]] || [[word:zhasuyukuoro|zhasuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
